cigarHint.hr: Most prema cigari je gusta botanika i borovica; kao martini koncentracija drži blažu do srednju cigaru — Connecticut ili mlađu Habano, gdje svježina reže kremasti dim.
cigarHint.en: The bridge to a cigar is dense botanicals and juniper; as a martini the concentration holds a mild-to-medium cigar — Connecticut or a younger Habano, where freshness cuts creamy smoke.

notes.hr: Referentni contemporary gin — složen botanički profil, odličan čist ili u martiniu.
notes.en: The reference contemporary gin — a complex botanical profile, excellent neat or in a martini.

cigarHint.hr: Bačveno zaokruženje daje malo više tijela od standardnog Monkeyja; čist ili martini nosi srednju Habano, a začinska botanika pravi most prema Habano wrapperu.
cigarHint.en: The barrel rounding gives a touch more body than the standard Monkey; neat or as a martini it carries a medium Habano, and the spiced botanicals bridge to a Habano wrapper.

notes.hr: Referentni contemporary gin — složen botanički profil, odličan čist ili u martiniu.
notes.en: The reference contemporary gin — a complex botanical profile, excellent neat or in a martini.

cigarHint.hr: Most prema cigari je zelena, travnata botanika Islaya; traži laganu do srednju cigaru — čist ili martini, gdje biljna svježina osvježava kremasti Connecticut dim.
cigarHint.en: The bridge to a cigar is Islay's green, herbal botanicals; it wants a mild-to-medium cigar — neat or a martini, where the herbal lift refreshes creamy Connecticut smoke.

notes.hr: Islay bilje + juniper — kompleksan čist sipper.
notes.en: Islay botanicals plus juniper — a complex neat sipper.

cigarHint.hr: Most prema cigari je citrus i začin; kao martini drži srednju cigaru, a citrusna svježina reže blaži, kremasti dim bez da ga preglasi.
cigarHint.en: The bridge to a cigar is citrus and spice; as a martini it holds a medium cigar, the citrus lift cutting milder, creamy smoke without overpowering it.

notes.hr: Australijski premium — složen, odličan čist.
notes.en: An Australian premium — complex, excellent neat.

cigarHint.hr: Cvjetni profil (ruža, krastavac) je nježan — most je svježina, ne tijelo; traži blagu Connecticut cigaru, gdje G&T ili martini radi kao osvježenje uz laki dim.
cigarHint.en: The floral profile (rose, cucumber) is delicate — the bridge is freshness, not body; it wants a mild Connecticut cigar, where a G&T or martini works as a refresher beside light smoke.

notes.hr: Klasičan cvjetni profil — pairing s blažom Connecticut cigarom.
notes.en: A classic floral profile — pairs with a milder Connecticut cigar.

cigarHint.hr: Japanski citrus (yuzu, jabuka) je elegantan i lagan; most je citrusna svježina uz blagu Connecticut ili Cameroon cigaru — čist ili martini da profil ostane koncentriran.
cigarHint.en: The Japanese citrus (yuzu, apple) is elegant and light; the bridge is citrus freshness with a mild Connecticut or Cameroon cigar — neat or a martini to keep the profile concentrated.

notes.hr: Japanski citrus gin — čist ili martini.
notes.en: A Japanese citrus gin — neat or in a martini.

cigarHint.hr: Citrus-forward London dry — most prema cigari je koriander i citrus; martini klasik drži srednju Habano, gdje začinska botanika sjeda uz Habano wrapper.
cigarHint.en: A citrus-forward London dry — the bridge to a cigar is coriander and citrus; the classic martini holds a medium Habano, the spiced botanicals settling against a Habano wrapper.

notes.hr: Premium London dry — citrus-forward, martini klasik.
notes.en: A premium London dry — citrus-forward, a martini classic.

cigarHint.hr: Citrus-forward London dry — most prema cigari je koriander i citrus; martini klasik drži srednju Habano, gdje začinska botanika sjeda uz Habano wrapper.
cigarHint.en: A citrus-forward London dry — the bridge to a cigar is coriander and citrus; the classic martini holds a medium Habano, the spiced botanicals settling against a Habano wrapper.

notes.hr: Premium London dry — citrus-forward, martini klasik.
notes.en: A premium London dry — citrus-forward, a martini classic.

cigarHint.hr: Mediteranska botanika (ružmarin, kadulja, borovica) pravi most uz Habano wrapper; najbolje G&T ili martini uz srednju cigaru — začinska svježina prati zemljasti dim.
cigarHint.en: Mediterranean botanicals (rosemary, sage, juniper) bridge to a Habano wrapper; best as a G&T or martini beside a medium cigar — the herbal lift tracking earthy smoke.

notes.hr: HR premium gin — mediteranski botanički karakter.
notes.en: A Croatian premium gin — Mediterranean botanical character.

cigarHint.hr: Mekši od klasičnog London dry — most je zaobljena borovica; dobar G&T uz srednju cigaru ili martini, gdje blaža žestina ne gazi kremasti dim.
cigarHint.en: Softer than a classic London dry — the bridge is rounded juniper; a good G&T beside a medium cigar or a martini, where the gentler heat doesn't trample creamy smoke.

notes.hr: Mekši od klasičnog London dry — dobar G&T uz srednju cigaru.
notes.en: Softer than a classic London dry — a good G&T with a medium cigar.

cigarHint.hr: Lokalni craft s mediteranskim biljem — most je začinska svježina uz blažu Habano; G&T ili martini da botanika ostane u prvom planu, bez guranja tijela.
cigarHint.en: A local craft with Mediterranean herbs — the bridge is a herbal lift beside a milder Habano; a G&T or martini to keep the botanicals forward, without pushing body.

notes.hr: Lokalni craft gin — dobar uz blažu Habano.
notes.en: A local craft gin — good with a milder Habano.

cigarHint.hr: Čist London dry profil — most prema cigari je klasična borovica i citrus; pouzdan martini uz srednju cigaru, svježina protiv kremastog dima.
cigarHint.en: A clean London dry profile — the bridge to a cigar is classic juniper and citrus; a dependable martini beside a medium cigar, freshness against creamy smoke.

notes.hr: Čist London dry profil — pouzdan za martini.
notes.en: A clean London dry profile — dependable for a martini.

cigarHint.hr: Čaj i citrus na London dry bazi — most je taninska gorčina čaja koja odgovara duhanskom začinu; lagana do srednja cigara, martini ili G&T kao aperitiv.
cigarHint.en: Tea and citrus on a London dry base — the bridge is the tea's tannic edge meeting tobacco spice; a mild-to-medium cigar, martini or G&T as an aperitif.

notes.hr: Tea & citrus twist na London dry.
notes.en: A tea-and-citrus twist on London dry.

cigarHint.hr: American dry s cvjetno-anisnim tonom — nježan profil traži laganu Connecticut cigaru; most je svježina anisa i cvijeća uz laki, kremasti dim.
cigarHint.en: An American dry with a floral-anise tone — the delicate profile wants a mild Connecticut cigar; the bridge is anise and floral lift beside light, creamy smoke.

notes.hr: American dry — cvjetno-anis profil, martini.
notes.en: American dry — a floral-anise profile, for a martini.

cigarHint.hr: Very Junipery Over Proof, 57.7% — dovoljno tijela i borovice da ponese srednju do punu cigaru; čist ili s kapi vode, borovica i začin nose maduro karamel kao 'treći akt'.
cigarHint.en: Very Junipery Over Proof, 57.7% — enough body and juniper to carry a medium-to-full cigar; neat or with a drop of water, the juniper and spice carry maduro caramel as a 'third act'.

notes.hr: Heuristika — contemporary, botanical
notes.en: Heuristic profile — contemporary, botanical

cigarHint.en: Kyoto botanicals (yuzu, hinoki, sansho pepper) are precise and floral; the bridge is citrus lift and peppery spice beside a mild-to-medium cigar — neat or a martini.

cigarHint.en: The reinforced Kyoto version at 54.5% — more body than the standard KI NO BI; it carries a medium cigar neat or with a drop of water, the peppery sansho bridging to a Habano wrapper.

cigarHint.hr: Navy strength 57% — koncentrirana borovica i žestina drže i maduro; čist ili s kapi vode uz punu cigaru, klasičan 'treći akt' s espressom (tamna čokolada + borovica nose karamel maduro wrappera).
cigarHint.en: Navy strength 57% — concentrated juniper and heat hold even a maduro; neat or with a drop of water beside a full cigar, a classic 'third act' with espresso (dark chocolate + juniper carrying maduro wrapper caramel).

name: Roku Gin The Japanese Craft Gin

cigarHint.hr: Japanski craft (sakura, sencha, sansho) — most je zeleni čaj i cvjetni začin uz laganu do srednju cigaru; martini drži profil, G&T radi kao aperitiv.
cigarHint.en: A Japanese craft (sakura, sencha, sansho) — the bridge is green tea and floral spice beside a mild-to-medium cigar; a martini holds the profile, a G&T works as an aperitif.
